description: Criteria for builder-lead implementation accuracy and quality assurance. Evaluator parses spec + execution_log + query to return boolean per field. Consolidated to 3 headers × 3 criteria max.

accuracy_dimensions.description: Code correctly realizes behavior specified in dispatch brief claim
accuracy_dimensions.boolean_return: execution_log contains implementation AND claim_realized == true

accuracy_dimensions.description: All specified tests pass including new tests and regression tests
accuracy_dimensions.boolean_return: execution_log contains test_results AND all_tests_pass == true AND regression_tests_pass == true

accuracy_dimensions.description: Code compiles, lints clean, and type-checks clean
accuracy_dimensions.boolean_return: execution_log contains build_pass == true AND lint_pass == true AND typecheck_pass == true

accuracy_verification.description: Confirm failing tests exist for claim and fail for right reason before implementation
accuracy_verification.boolean_return: execution_log contains red_tests_exist == true AND tests_fail_for_right_reason == true BEFORE green_phase

accuracy_verification.description: Run all tests after implementation, confirm green, capture pass/fail per test
accuracy_verification.boolean_return: execution_log contains all_tests_pass == true AND test_results_captured == true

accuracy_verification.description: Verify tests would fail if claim is false (oracle honesty)
accuracy_verification.boolean_return: execution_log contains oracle_honesty_verified == true AND justification_present == true

must_not_claim_accuracy_when.description: Must not claim accuracy when tests were modified to pass instead of implementation making them pass
Must not claim integration accuracy when seam was mocked in test environment
Must not claim accuracy when lint, type check, or build failed
must_not_claim_accuracy_when.boolean_return: NOT (execution_log contains (lint_fail OR typecheck_fail OR build_fail) AND claim_build_clean)
